description: Code-agent dialogue and code graph tool shell. code_gen_orchestrate now validates full_requirement, runner_id, and context.session_id before the future graph is connected.

publicContracts.name: code_gen_orchestrate
publicContracts.description: Code graph shell tool. It requires full_requirement and runner_id, carries context.session_id, and returns a runner-assignment instruction when runner_id is missing.
publicContracts.payloadShape: { full_requirement: string; runner_id?: string; context?: { session_id?: string }; requirement?: string; runnerId?: string; targetKind?: 'solution'|'app'|'view'|'unit'; solutionName?: string; appName?: string; unitName?: string; allowCreateSolution?: boolean; logicModelId?: string; frontendModelId?: string; logicModelIndex?: number; frontendModelIndex?: number }
publicContracts.resultShape: String. Missing runner_id returns a runner assignment instruction; present runner_id returns an accepted graph-shell summary.
publicContracts.subject: code-agent

publicContracts.name: CodeAgentTargetKind
publicContracts.description: Coarse target kind retained for the next workflow implementation.

publicContracts.name: CodeAgentTargetSelection
publicContracts.description: Runner-backed Solution/App target metadata retained for the next workflow implementation.
publicContracts.payloadShape: { targetKind: CodeAgentTargetKind; runnerId: string; solutionId: string; solutionName: string; solutionVersion: string; solutionInitialized: boolean; appId?: string; appName?: string; appVersion?: string; appInitialized?: boolean }
